artifacts.caption: Downloads manager reports one saved 240 KB download.

artifacts.description: XcodeBuildMCP semantic UI-tree excerpts for Downloads, Data & Storage, disk detail, and export.
Shared build, runtime, simulator, and command log references for the local evidence run.

fixtures: UITestSeed downloaded episode and storage settings state
run.live_dependency_rationale: No paid provider or live LLM dependency is used by storage/download settings.

branches.expected: Downloads manager lists saved download and removal affordances.
Export detail lists record count and share path.

attempts.notes: Downloads manager reports one saved 240 KB episode, but Downloads & Disk reports Zero KB and Nothing on disk. Export Data shows 4 records and JSON schema v1.

execution.retry_policy: Re-run I4 after fixing #717; destructive Clear All Data remains a deliberate teardown branch.

branch_coverage.expected: Export screen lists records and share action.

branch_coverage.trigger: Tap Clear All Data and confirm.
branch_coverage.expected: Content is wiped while credentials and identity are preserved.

verdict.summary: SET-005 fails because Downloads reports one saved 240 KB episode while Downloads & Disk reports Zero KB and Nothing on disk in the same seeded run.
verdict.score_gate_explanation: The storage accounting contradiction is a current functional defect tracked by #717.

attempted_test.summary: Executed SET-005 locally with XcodeBuildMCP using --UITestSeed. Captured Downloads manager, Data & Storage main, Downloads & Disk, and Export Data.

actual_result.summary: Downloads manager shows one saved downloaded episode at 240 KB. Downloads & Disk reports Zero KB and Nothing on disk. Export Data shows 4 records with JSON schema v1.

artifacts.summary: Attached five current screenshots, a semantic UI-tree excerpt, and shared log references.

ui_polish_report.summary: Downloads, Data & Storage, and Export Data screens are readable and native; the failing state is data consistency, not visual layout.

ux_polish_report.summary: Storage accounting contradiction breaks user trust in cleanup and disk usage. Export copy correctly excludes API and private keys.

performance_metrics.summary: Local UI-tree node counts were collected for Downloads (183), Data & Storage (171), Storage detail (174), and Export Data (213).

privacy_security.summary: Export Data copy states API keys and the Nostr private key are never included; Clear All Data copy states credentials and identity are preserved.

defects_issues_filed.summary: Filed #717 for the Downloads & Disk storage mismatch.

verdict.summary: Evidence-backed fail for SET-005 due to storage accounting mismatch. Clear All Data teardown remains intentionally unrun.

attempted_test.rationale: A current simulator run exercised downloads, data/storage, disk detail, and export paths.

actual_result.rationale: Storage detail contradicts the downloads manager in the same run.

artifacts.rationale: Screenshots, UI tree, metrics, log references, and issue link are attached.

ui_polish.rationale: The screens are readable and stable; the failure is data inconsistency.

ux_polish.rationale: Conflicting storage numbers make disk management untrustworthy.

performance.rationale: Node-count metrics are attached; no Instruments trace is attached.

privacy_security.rationale: Export and clear-data copy make credential/private-key boundaries explicit; destructive teardown was not run.

defects_issues_filed.rationale: The real defect is filed as #717 with current evidence references.

verdict.rationale: SET-005 fails until #717 is resolved and revalidated.

evidence_reproducibility.rationale: Current screenshots, UI tree, metrics, issue link, and log references are attached.

product_experience.rationale: The UI is coherent, but contradictory storage numbers hurt trust.

engineering_quality.rationale: Storage accounting is inconsistent between two app surfaces.

follow_through.rationale: A GitHub issue is filed; revalidation remains open.

ui.summary: The settings surfaces are legible and use native controls; the storage detail content is wrong.

ux.summary: Users see one saved download, then a Zero KB disk report. This breaks the disk-management task.

performance.summary: Node-count metrics are captured for all I4 screens; no Instruments trace is attached.

privacy_security.summary: Export and clear-data copy state credential/private-key boundaries. Clear All Data was not executed.

missing.reason: Destructive Clear All Data branch was intentionally skipped.
VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, and contrast were not audited.

evidence.redaction_summary: Screenshots and UI-tree excerpts contain seeded public podcast/settings data only. No API keys or private keys are exposed.

metrics.name: Downloads manager saved download size
metrics.budget: Should match or be accounted for by storage detail

metrics.name: Downloads & Disk reported storage
metrics.budget: Should account for saved downloaded episode bytes

metrics.name: Export Data visible record count
metrics.budget: Visible count should match category breakdown

instrumentation_gaps.summary: Downloads & Disk reports Zero KB while Downloads reports one saved 240 KB episode.
Destructive Clear All Data teardown branch was skipped.

risks.title: Users cannot trust disk usage or cleanup if downloads and storage disagree.
risks.mitigation: Fix #717 and re-run I4 with the same seeded downloaded episode.

issues.title: I4/SET-005: Downloads & Disk reports Zero KB while Downloads shows a saved 240 KB episode

next_actions.title: Fix Downloads & Disk accounting so it matches saved downloads or explains exclusions.
Re-run SET-005 and capture Downloads, Downloads & Disk, and Export Data after the fix.
